preset_description: Dark = substance signal. Spotlights product capabilities and metrics. CTA and pricing are understated — features are the story, not conversion pressure.

brief.audience: Startups needing an AI-ready design system

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Slim hero providing immediate context: MODE is the AI-ready design system for startups. At conversion stage this is kept lean—just a page title and brief framing so the visitor knows they're in the right place before hitting the decision moment.

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Validator archetype demands proof before committing. Even in a stripped conversion flow, omitting evidence would violate the archetype's core need. A compact proof block—key metrics, adoption numbers, or a short case-study callout—satisfies the Validator's skepticism without bloating the page.

beats.name: Decision
beats.rationale: Required before Conversion at the conversion funnel stage. Presents pricing tiers and plan comparison so the startup can frame their choice clearly, reducing last-moment hesitation.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: The primary action capture moment—CTA to start the paid plan. Positioned immediately before Recovery per structural rules, capitalizing on the momentum from Evidence and Decision.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Always-last beat. Provides secondary paths (contact sales, explore docs, free trial fallback) and footer navigation to catch anyone not yet ready to commit, ensuring no visitor reaches a dead end.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Global navigation — wayfinding and persistent CTA for the session.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Slim hero providing immediate context: MODE is the AI-ready design system for startups. At conversion stage this is kept lean—just a page title and brief framing so the visitor knows they're in the right place before hitting the decision moment.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.rationale: Required before Conversion at the conversion funnel stage. Presents pricing tiers and plan comparison so the startup can frame their choice clearly, reducing last-moment hesitation.

sections.name: CTA
sections.rationale: The primary action capture moment—CTA to start the paid plan. Positioned immediately before Recovery per structural rules, capitalizing on the momentum from Evidence and Decision.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Page close — brand mark, minimal navigation, and legal.

page.reasoning: Conversion funnel stage requires minimal variant — 'minimal variant for conversion-focused pages — strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only.' The persistent CTA in nav is critical for conversion optimization.

Conversion funnel stage calls for text-only variant baseline, but Validator archetype requires social-proof inclusion. The notes state 'Validator variant always includes trust_signal' and 'with-social-proof variant places LogoStrip immediately below CTACluster,' directly supporting validator trust-building in the decision moment.

slots.headline: Your design system knows how to render. MODE teaches it why.
slots.subhead: The semantic intelligence layer that resolves component behavior, copy register, and visual emphasis — automatically, for every user and funnel stage.
slots.trust_signal: One-time payment. Lifetime access. No subscription.

page.reasoning: Validator archetype conversion requires 'Validator variant includes description and longer feature list.' The highlighted variant surfaces the recommended plan for validators who need comprehensive information to commit.

slots.description: The full intelligence layer — resolution engine, component manifest, IA planner, and multi-variant generation. Yours forever, no subscription, no lock-in.
features: IA planner + multi-variant generation (Mover, Validator, Explorer)
Three palette presets — funnel, archetype, feature-emphasis
Token dashboard with editable palette map
Bring your own Anthropic API key — you own the spend

page.reasoning: Validator archetype conversion stage: 'Validator variant: include subhead and trust_signal (e.g., 'No credit card required').' Centered layout with trust messaging directly supports validator conversion psychology.

slots.headline: The intelligence layer your design system is missing.
slots.subhead: One kit. Lifetime access. Running in under an hour — configured once, works across every brief you ship.
slots.trust_signal: One-time payment. No subscription. No runtime dependency. Full ownership.

page.reasoning: Conversion funnel stage on key conversion pages: 'with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows.' Recovery CTA at page close maximizes validator conversion capture.
